mapper.select: SELECT response_text FROM semantic_cache WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW()) AND 1 - (query_embedding <=> #{queryEmbedding}::vector) > #{threshold} ORDER BY query_embedding <=> #{queryEmbedding}::vector LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO semantic_cache (kb_id, query_embedding, query_text, response_text, hit_count, expires_at) VALUES (#{kbId}, #{embedding}::vector, #{queryText}, #{responseText}, 0, NOW() + INTERVAL '6 hours')
